_comment: Auto-update manifest consumed by tauri-plugin-updater. Updated alongside each tagged release. The signature field carries a minisign signature of the corresponding installer; the matching public key is baked into apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json under plugins.updater.pubkey.
notes: Mycelium v0.10.0-beta.1 — quality of life: drag-reorder pinned notes, multi-select sidebar with bulk pin / unpin / trash / export, in-editor find & replace (Ctrl+H), locale + i18n stub. Includes the v0.9.0 visualization work (Dashboard tab with at-a-glance stats, top tags, 12-week activity heatmap, interactive [[wiki-link]] note graph). See https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/releases/tag/v0.10.0-beta.1 for full notes.
